data.footnote: Algorithm 1: Batch Normalizing Transform, applied to activation \( x \) over a mini-batch.
data.html:
Input：Values of x over a mini-batch：B = {x1...m}；Parameters to be learned：γ，β
Output：{yi = BNγ，β(xi)}
μB←1m∑mi=1xi//mini-batch mean
σ2B←1m∑mi=1(xi−μB)2//mini-batch variance
^xi←xi−μB√σ2B+ε//normalize
yi←γ^xi+βBNγ，β(xi)//scale and shift
